headline: Robinhood To Report As Growth Slows And Expansions Add Risk
summary: Robinhood prepares to report earnings for the first quarter late Tuesday with user engagement and growth moves, including prediction markets, under watch. Robinhood stock fell near key technical levels.

headline: BlackRock vs. Schwab: One Financial Dividend Is Built to Last a Generation
summary: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) and Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW) reported first quarter earnings this month, revealing two very different financial businesses with nearly identical market caps but sharply contrasting dividend stories. One is a fee-compounding asset management machine. The other is a brokerage and banking hybrid mid-recovery. Both raised their dividends. The gap in durability is ... BlackRock vs. Schwab: One Financial Dividend Is Built to Last a Generation
